reviews.comment:
Un rico lugar para tomar un buen café con ricas medialunas. Ojalá hubieran más cafeterías; en playas doradas sobretodo y que atiendan todo el año

(Translated by Google)
A great place to enjoy a good coffee with delicious croissants. I wish there were more coffee shops, especially on golden beaches, and that they were open year-round.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación de servicio siempre paramos ahí ya que después entramos a playas doradas son 32 km adentro y esta asfaltado lugar soñado hay que entrar y no te vas a querer ir más de ese lugar. Es solo un lugar para los que aman la paz el mar y playas tranquilas.

(Translated by Google)
A very good gas station. We always stop there because afterward, we reach the golden beaches. It's 32 km inland and paved. It's a dream place. You have to go in and you won't want to leave. It's simply a place for those who love peace, the sea, and quiet beaches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkaFBhNVFnEAE
